name: claude-animation-skill
description: 'Claude animation and motion-picture design assistance. Use for writing prompts, storyboard ideas, animation concepts, motion synthesis guidance, and video/visual storytelling workflows.'

# Claude Animation Skill

## When to Use

- Creating animation concepts or motion-picture narratives
- Writing prompts for AI-powered video and motion synthesis
- Generating storyboards, scene directions, and animation beats
- Designing motion graphics, transitions, or animated UI behavior
- Converting visual ideas into concise instructions for Claude

## Procedure

1. Describe the animation or motion-picture idea clearly
2. Specify the medium: 2D, 3D, motion graphics, UI animation, or cinematic sequence
3. Mention style, pacing, camera movement, and any visual references
4. Use the skill to generate:
   - a prompt for Claude or an animation tool
   - storyboard steps and scene descriptions
   - motion timing, easing, and composition notes

## Examples

- "Create a short animated product demo with smooth camera dolly and bounce transitions."
- "Write a storyboard for a 10-second character walk cycle in a stylized 3D world."
- "Generate a motion-direction prompt for an AI video tool to make a kinetic typography clip."

## Notes

- This skill is intended for prompt engineering and creative direction, not rendering the final video.
- Pair the generated prompts with your preferred motion or video synthesis tool for production.
